zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Cunningham of Caprington於1516年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素時，她的父親John Baronet Cunningham16歲，母親Annabella Campbell of Loudon15歲。她和Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree至少有8個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1557年1月31日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Cunningham of Caprington于1516年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素时，她的父亲John Baronet Cunningham16岁，母亲Annabella Campbell of Loudon15岁。她和Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree至少有8个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1557年1月31日在苏格兰斯林史爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Cunningham of Caprington was born in 1516, in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, John Baronet Cunningham, was 16 and her mother, Annabella Campbell of Loudon, was 15. She had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree. She died on 31 January 1557, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Cunningham of Caprington est née en 1516, à Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Baronet Cunningham, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Annabella Campbell of Loudon, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1557, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Cunningham of Caprington 1516 in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Baronet Cunningham 16 und ihre Mutter Annabella Campbell of Loudon 15. Sie hatte mit Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Januar 1557 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Cunningham of Caprington è nata il nel 1516 nel Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Baronet Cunningham, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Annabella Campbell of Loudon, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree. Morì il 31 gennaio 1557, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Cunningham of Capringtonが1516年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカプリントン カストルで生まれた時，父John Baronet Cunninghamは16歳，母Annabella Campbell of Loudonは15歳であった。彼女はAndrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltreeとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1557年1月31日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Cunningham of Caprington(이)가 1516년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 캡링턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Baronet Cunningham(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Campbell of Loudon(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 1월 31일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree. Ela faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1557, em Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Cunningham of Caprington родилась в 1516 г. в местности капрингтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Baronet Cunningham было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Campbell of Loudon, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Andrew Stewart 2nd Lord Stewart of Ochiltree. Она умерла 31 января 1557 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 41 год.
